info.title: CanonicaLib Package Comparer
info.description: A comprehensive CLI tool for comparing NuGet packages and DLLs with AI-powered migration analysis

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: CanonicaLib Package Comparer - Compare functionality between two NuGet packages

arguments.name: package1
arguments.description: First NuGet package (package ID and version, e.g., 'Newtonsoft.Json/13.0.1' or path to .nupkg file)

arguments.name: package2
arguments.description: Second NuGet package (package ID and version, e.g., 'Newtonsoft.Json/13.0.2' or path to .nupkg file)
